items.title: Watch for post-intake review signals from the MOHW lottery-grant cycle
items.question: After the June 16 local-review handoff, do any proposal themes, shortlist signals, or reusable framing patterns become visible?

items.title: Mine the FSC financial-education results booklet for reusable formats
items.question: Which official examples from the new booklet are actually reusable for FamilyFin education, anti-fraud, or member communication?

items.title: Track whether Anthropic restores Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access quickly
items.question: Does the suspension resolve fast enough to treat the launch as workflow-relevant, or is the bigger lesson still fallback discipline?

items.title: Keep watching for Codex features that support shared weekly handoff workflows
items.question: Are the recent Codex sharing and quota-management changes enough to justify a pilot for one weekly artifact handoff?
